results.title: Katy Perry, BLACKPINK's Lisa, Future and Anitta deliver show-stopping performances at FIFA World Cup 2026 Canada opening ceremony
results.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 opening ceremony in Los Angeles delivered a star-studded spectacle, with Katy Perry, BLACKPINK's Lisa, Future and Anitta taking centre stage. Their electrifying performances set the tone for the biggest edition of football's global showpiece tournament.
